description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a clean, geometric design with white exterior walls and large windows. The property is enclosed by a dark fence and includes a spacious backyard with a rectangular swimming pool surrounded by palm trees and a green lawn. The front of the house has a paved driveway and a covered carport, while the rear opens to a private garden area. The windows are arranged in both single and grouped patterns, providing ample natural light. The overall structure is low-rise, with a single story and no visible porch or veranda. The architectural style emphasizes simplicity, open space, and a strong connection to the outdoor environment.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, white walls, large windows, a backyard pool, and palm trees, all enclosed by a dark fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, paved driveway, covered carport, and the white facade with large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard with a rectangular swimming pool, green lawn, and several palm trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the private garden, pool area, and the back facade with grouped windows and a single palm tree in the foreground.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, lawn, and the side of the bungalow with additional windows and a clear view of the flat roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and single windows
